title: Senior Software Engineer - BEL - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BEL - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BEL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About BEL:
BEL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL!
